creator: misha@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 240147
dmesg 14-current

We have Redmi laptop and on -current its keyboard doesn't work in the console, on 13.1 keyboard is working, but it's very slow in response - there is delay about 3-4 seconds between the press and letter appearance on the screen. The keyboard works in boot menu. USB attached wireless keyboard also works fine.

We tested OpenBSD current too and it has almost the same issue - when you press the key it prints around 7-8 times on the screen but also with the delay, so the keyboard isn't functional there too.

Dmesg attached.
